title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Workshop - How to build a Stage 2 Ethereum Rollup
description:
Stage 2 represents the gold standard of rollup decentralization, but reaching it has proven exceptionally challenging. This workshop by Tom Lehman (Facet, Co-founder & CEO) covers the concrete, production-ready techniques needed to achieve Stage 2 today.

Workshop given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
